Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.19.5
GAIA Database Neighborhood Explorer updates. Asterism Explorer, see the true shape of some common constellations. Wedge Exploration, right click any star and slice a wedge towards it to see sturcture. Minimum Distance, create a shell of data. Cube, fill the whole volume, not just a sphere.

SyQon Parallax bug fixes.
